careerTraits.title: Architecture-first thinking
careerTraits.body: You design the system before you write a line of it. You'd rather spend two days on a diagram than two weeks unpicking a bad one.

careerTraits.title: Allergic to patchwork
careerTraits.body: You can't leave a broken abstraction alone. If you have to hold your nose to ship, you'd rather refactor the thing properly.

careerTraits.title: The gold-standard stack feels like home
careerTraits.body: TypeScript, .NET, Node, PostgreSQL, Kafka, Docker. Opinionated about these tools because you've used them under real load.

careerTraits.title: You ship, and you stay
careerTraits.body: Production on a Tuesday - never a Friday. You own things after they ship: bugs, performance, and the unexpected page.

careerTraits.title: Direct, kind, no politics
careerTraits.body: Honest in code review, honest in retro. Small team means every personality compounds. We say the thing.

careerTraits.title: Curious about messy domains
careerTraits.body: Fintech rails, music rights, real-time audio. You don't need to know the domain on day one - you need to want to learn it deeply.

hiringSteps.title: Send your application
hiringSteps.body: Fill in the form with a few lines about yourself and attach your CV. Tell us what you've built, not just where you worked.

hiringSteps.title: We review and reply
hiringSteps.body: Every application gets a real read. Expect a response within 5 business days - yes or no, always.

hiringSteps.title: Founders call
hiringSteps.body: A direct conversation with Jose and Rui. No trick questions - we want to understand how you think and what problems excite you.

hiringSteps.title: Technical interview
hiringSteps.body: Real work, not whiteboard theatre. We'll look at something you've built, walk through a design decision, or pair on a focused exercise.
